title: stelis oxypetala
intro: Stelis oxypetala, also known as the butterfly orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties due to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
